entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2013 and continuing under the Gate brand, with an established predecessor relationship to Bter.
entity.notes: Official company history and an independent exchange profile support the 2013 founding year and current operation. The existing Bter predecessor link is preserved.

expected.summary: Cayman Islands-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the Gate.io brand.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2013 and continuing under the Gate brand, with an established predecessor relationship to Bter.
changes.notes: Official company history and an independent exchange profile support the 2013 founding year and current operation. The existing Bter predecessor link is preserved.

events.title: Gate.io began operating
events.description: Gate.io traces its exchange operation to 2013 and remains active under the Gate brand.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker based on official company history.

evidence.title: About Gate.io
evidence.notes: Official company page identifying 2013 as Gate's founding year.

evidence.title: Gate celebrates its 12th anniversary
evidence.notes: Official anniversary material corroborating the exchange's long-running identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Gate
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Gate identity and 2013 establishment year.
